summary: Curated readiness cohort that fixes preflight, execution, evaluation, and memo writeback roles for Phase Alpha on the promoted local runtime.
activation_conditions: one-session curated readiness proof on the promoted local Qwen runtime
explicit preflight, bounded execution, evaluation, and memo writeback must all stay named
the route must reuse existing playbooks instead of inventing a new agent family
required_handoffs: architect owns preflight, source-of-truth checks, boundary selection, approval posture, and stop conditions
coder executes bounded mutation or bounded run work only after explicit architect handoff
reviewer closes verification and names rollback or re-entry posture before the route continues
evaluator runs the mapped eval bundles and interprets pass, fail, or blocked posture without replacing review
memory-keeper prepares memo writeback, provenance continuity, and rerun recall posture
boundary_note: Alpha_curated is the curator-facing readiness cohort for Phase Alpha and must not replace checkpoint_cohort, orchestrated_loop, or scenario canon owned by aoa-playbooks.
